subject: What's next after your download
body: Hey there. Thanks for grabbing one of our guides or tools recently. I've been getting great feedback on the AI Product Factory guide, and I'm curious if you've had a chance to dig into what you downloaded yet. We just published a practical guide on building Claude Code automation skills that pairs really well with what we're releasing—might be worth a look if you're interested in going deeper. Stop by mini-on-ai.com anytime to see what else is cooking.
